purpose: Define the first reviewable contract for rendering monitoring project forms from Dataverse metadata instead of hard-coded TACATDP screens.

renderer_surfaces.responsibility: Select MonitoringProject, Instrument, InstrumentVersion, and optional EventDefinition or Encounter.
Load ordered GroupDefinition records, manage progress, navigation, validation, save state, and submit/review actions.
Choose input controls from FieldDefinition data type, control kind, appearance, vocabulary binding, reference binding, and rule metadata.
Create and navigate repeatable GroupInstance rows without hard-coded repeat screens.
Show completion state, required visible errors, repeat summaries, and final submission actions.

mp_GroupDefinition.purpose: Controls whether the group renders as a page, a multi-field page, a repeat manager/list, or a review-only summary.
Controls back/next behavior and whether users can jump to this group from a section index.
Optional group-level relevance expression evaluated against the current answer context.
Controls vertical spacing; one field per row remains the default within the chosen density.
Short label for progress display, breadcrumbs, and section index.

mp_FieldDefinition.purpose: Renderer control family selected after data type, appearance, and reference binding are resolved.
XLSForm/renderer appearance hint such as numbers_phone, placement-map, minimal, search, or field-list-derived behavior.
Resolved helper text shown below the visible label and above inline errors.
Field-level relevance expression evaluated before required/constraint validation.
Controls whether choices come from vocabulary terms or a dedicated delegated reference table.
Vocabulary scheme code or reference table logical name such as mp_VillageReference.
Delegation-safe cascade/filter expression derived from XLSForm choice_filter where supported.
Supported constraint expression evaluated before navigation/save.
Supported calculated/default expression for computed or prefilled values.

supported_rule_expression_subset.notes: Required is enforced only when the group and field are visible/relevant.
First implementation should translate a reviewed subset of XLSForm relevance expressions to Power Fx.
Use explicit visible errors; do not silently accept invalid values.
Must be delegation-safe for Dataverse. Village filters use mp_VillageReference RegionCode, DistrictCode, and WardCode indexes.
Support simple arithmetic and selected-count summaries first; defer complex XPath/repeat calculations.

control_mapping.answer_storage: mp_AnswerValue.RawValue plus term/code snapshot until lookup answer support is finalized
mp_AnswerValue.RawValue plus village code/label snapshot until reference lookup answer support is finalized

goals: Render one field per row from metadata.
Load region/district/ward from vocabulary terms and village from mp_VillageReference.
Persist scalar answers as mp_AnswerValue-shaped records.
Render a repeat manager for line items.
Create one GroupInstance per production-cost line.
Persist each line item's scalar answers under its GroupInstance.
Show a repeat summary before submission.

deferred: Arbitrary nested repeat UI beyond one pilot repeat group
